description: Routing config that dictates app UI transitions and coaching paths based on user brew ratings, symptom identification, and historical feedback.

diagnosis.primary_action: Guide the user through symptom identification
diagnosis.flow: Ask 'What's wrong with the taste?' -> present the 7 symptom options -> deliver method-specific fix.

improvement.primary_action: Ask the user if they can identify a specific problem OR if they'd prefer to select improvement goals
improvement.flow: Ask 'Can you describe a specific taste issue?' (route to diagnosis with moderate fixes) OR 'Would you rather tell me what you want more/less of?' (route to improvement goals).
improvement.ui_hint: Getting there — let's dial it in.

refinement.primary_action: Present improvement goals only — no symptom diagnosis needed
refinement.flow: Say 'Great cup! Want to make it even better?' -> present improvement goals from improvement_goals_map.json

lock_in.primary_action: Congratulate the user and suggest saving this as a favourite recipe
lock_in.flow: Say 'Amazing brew! Save this recipe?' -> offer to bookmark/favourite this bean+method+params combo
lock_in.special_action: If brew_number >= 2 and previous brews were rated lower, highlight the journey: 'You went from {first_rating} to {current_rating} in {brew_number} brews!'

transition_rules.rating_changed_between_brews: If brew N-1 was in Diagnosis mode (e.g., 3) and brew N is in Improvement mode (e.g., 6), acknowledge progress: 'Big improvement! Last time we fixed {symptom}, now let's refine further.'
transition_rules.rating_dropped_between_brews: If brew N-1 was in Refinement mode (e.g., 7) and brew N is in Diagnosis mode (e.g., 4), acknowledge the regression and check if the user followed the previous suggestion or made their own changes.
transition_rules.first_brew: Go straight to the appropriate mode based on rating without transition messaging.

cold_brew.filtration: double filter with paper or fine cloth

woody_papery.action: Rinse filter / check freshness. No parameter tweak generated.

oscillating_trend_detected.action: Regardless of current rating, override to: 'Focus on consistency. Brew the same recipe 3 times before changing anything.' No goals offered.

plateau_detected.action: Regardless of current rating, override to plateau messaging from brew_history_logic.json (try different recipe/method/accept ceiling).

improving_trend_hits_7_plus.action: Suggest locking in. Even though 7-8 normally offers refinement goals, an improving trend that just hit 7 should celebrate first.
